all.en: This document summarizes the exit interview conducted with the departing employee.
all.zh: 本文件摘錄與離職員工進行之離職面談內容。

all.en: The interview took place last Thursday in a confidential meeting room.
all.zh: 面談於上週四在保密會議室中進行。

all.en: It was facilitated by a senior member of the human resources department.
all.zh: 面談由人資部門一位資深成員主持。

all.en: The employee served the company for four years and two months in total.
all.zh: 該員工於本公司服務合計四年又兩個月。

all.en: She held the position of marketing specialist in the consumer products group.
all.zh: 她於消費性產品事業群擔任行銷專員一職。

all.en: Her last working day is scheduled for the end of this month.
all.zh: 她最後的工作日預定為本月月底。

all.en: The primary reason cited for departure was a career growth opportunity elsewhere.
all.zh: 離職的主要原因為其他單位提供的職涯發展機會。

all.en: She accepted a senior management role at a competing firm in Singapore.
all.zh: 她接受新加坡一間同業競爭公司的高階管理職位。

all.en: When asked about workload, she described it as challenging but manageable.
all.zh: 問及工作量時，她形容其雖具挑戰但仍在可承受範圍內。

all.en: She expressed appreciation for the supportive team environment she experienced.
all.zh: 她對所體驗到的支持性團隊環境表達感激之意。

all.en: She highlighted strong learning opportunities provided through cross-functional projects.
all.zh: 她肯定透過跨部門專案所獲得的豐富學習機會。

all.en: She rated her direct manager as approachable, fair, and consistently supportive.
all.zh: 她評其直屬主管為親切、公正且持續給予支持。

all.en: Constructive feedback included longer feedback cycles and slower promotion timelines.
all.zh: 建設性回饋包括回饋週期過長及晉升時程偏緩。

all.en: She noted that compensation lagged the market for her experience level.
all.zh: 她指出薪酬相對於其經驗水準的市場行情有落差。

all.en: She also suggested clearer career development paths for individual contributors.
all.zh: 她並建議為個人貢獻者規劃更清晰的職涯發展路徑。

all.en: She recommended improving the onboarding program for newly hired team members.
all.zh: 她建議改善新進團隊成員的到職培訓計畫。

all.en: Suggested improvements included structured mentorship and a thirty-day check-in.
all.zh: 建議的改善方式包括有結構的導師制度與三十天回訪檢核。

all.en: Overall employee satisfaction was rated as eight on a ten-point scale.
all.zh: 整體員工滿意度於十分量表中獲評為八分。

all.en: She confirmed that she would recommend the company to qualified candidates.
all.zh: 她確認願意向合格候選人推薦本公司。

all.en: Knowledge transfer for ongoing campaigns has already been documented and shared.
all.zh: 進行中行銷活動的知識移轉已完成記錄並分享。

all.en: All company equipment will be returned during her final week on site.
all.zh: 所有公司設備將於她最後一週於現場歸還。

all.en: The HR team will process her final settlement within the legal timeframe.
all.zh: 人資團隊將於法定期限內辦理其最終結算。

all.en: She remains open to alumni network events and future collaboration opportunities.
all.zh: 她仍樂於參與校友網絡活動及未來合作機會。

all.en: Action items from this interview will be shared with relevant department heads.
all.zh: 本次面談所列的行動項目將分享給相關部門主管。

all.en: The talent team will benchmark compensation bands against the latest regional surveys.
all.zh: 人才團隊將依最新區域調查重新對標薪酬級距。

all.en: A revised career framework for individual contributors is currently in draft form.
all.zh: 為個人貢獻者規劃的修訂職涯架構目前已進入草案階段。

all.en: Onboarding redesign efforts will incorporate the structured mentorship suggestion.
all.zh: 新人培訓再造計畫將納入結構化導師制度的建議。

all.en: Quarterly feedback sessions will replace the current annual review cycle next year.
all.zh: 明年起每季回饋會議將取代目前的年度檢視週期。

all.en: She agreed to participate in a follow up survey six months after departure.
all.zh: 她同意於離職六個月後參與追蹤調查。

all.en: Her LinkedIn profile will be updated after the official last working day.
all.zh: 其 LinkedIn 檔案將於正式最後工作日後更新。

all.en: Non disclosure obligations were reviewed and acknowledged during the meeting.
all.zh: 保密義務於會議中經檢視並獲確認。

all.en: Her replacement search has been opened externally with priority screening enabled.
all.zh: 其職缺已對外開放招募並啟用優先篩選。

all.en: A farewell gathering is planned with the team during the final week.
all.zh: 團隊規劃於最後一週舉辦歡送聚會。

all.en: We wish her every success as she begins this exciting new professional chapter.
all.zh: 我們祝福她於展開這段令人期待的全新職涯篇章時諸事順利。

all.en: Her departing thoughts will be shared anonymously with executive leadership.
all.zh: 她的離職感想將以匿名方式分享給高階領導層。

all.en: Final paycheck and unused leave compensation will be processed promptly.
all.zh: 最後一期薪資與未休假補償將迅速處理。

all.en: Equity vesting calculations have been confirmed and shared with her in writing.
all.zh: 股權歸屬計算已確認並以書面方式告知她。

all.en: Stock option exercise windows close ninety days after the last working day.
all.zh: 股票選擇權履約期於最後工作日後九十天截止。

all.en: Health benefits continuation options were reviewed during the interview itself.
all.zh: 面談中已檢視健康福利的延續方案選項。

all.en: Outplacement services were declined as she has already secured her next role.
all.zh: 由於她已確定下一份工作，因此婉拒了再就業協助服務。

all.en: Personal files and contacts have been backed up and transferred appropriately.
all.zh: 個人檔案與聯絡資料已適當地備份與移交。

all.en: Building access credentials will be deactivated automatically at end of day.
all.zh: 辦公大樓門禁權限將於當日結束時自動停用。

all.en: Email forwarding will be set up for thirty days following her departure.
all.zh: 離職後將設置三十天的電子郵件轉寄。

all.en: We thank her sincerely for her dedicated service and lasting contributions made.
all.zh: 我們由衷感謝她全心投入的服務與所留下的長遠貢獻。

all.en: Honestly, she paused for a long moment when asked what she would miss most about the office.
all.zh: 說真的，當被問到最捨不得辦公室的哪個部分時，她沉默了好一會兒。

all.en: She mentioned the friendly security guard by name and how he always remembered her morning coffee order.
all.zh: 她特別提到一位友善的警衛，說對方總是記得她早晨點的咖啡。

all.en: The HR lead handed her a small bouquet of sunflowers at the end of the meeting as a personal gesture.
all.zh: 面談結束時，人資主管私下送了她一小束向日葵以表心意。

all.en: She admitted that the decision to leave kept her awake for several nights before submitting notice.
all.zh: 她坦言這個離職決定，讓她在遞辭呈前好幾個晚上輾轉難眠。

all.en: Her team had quietly chipped in to buy her a hand-bound journal as a farewell gift.
all.zh: 她團隊默默集資買了一本手工裝幀的筆記本作為餞別禮物。

all.en: Honestly, she said her favorite lunch spot near the office is what she will miss most after relocating.
all.zh: 說真的，她說搬家後最想念的，是辦公室附近最常吃的那家午餐小店。

all.en: She left a handwritten thank-you card on her manager's keyboard the night before her last day.
all.zh: 她在最後一個工作日的前一晚，在主管鍵盤上留下了一張手寫感謝卡。

all.en: Looking back, she said the company gave her courage to ask for what she wanted in her next role.
all.zh: 回頭看，她說在這家公司的日子，給了她在下一份工作勇敢爭取自己想要的東西的底氣。

all.en: Her direct reports threw a small bubble tea party on Friday afternoon to send her off warmly.
all.zh: 她的部屬週五下午辦了個小型珍珠奶茶派對，溫暖地為她送行。

all.en: Tonight she plans to walk home along her usual route one last time and take it all in slowly.
all.zh: 今晚她打算沿著平常下班的路線最後一次走回家，慢慢把這一切收進心裡。
